{{Quote|We will certainly release the Eickarie prisoners. We just may not be able to do so before we face the Warlord.|"Shadow"|<ref name="Fool's Bargain" />}}
'''Unit Aurek-Seven''' was a four-man [[Squad/Legends|squad]] in [[Aurek Company]] of the [[501st Legion (Empire of the Hand)|501st]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]] [[Legion/Legends|Legion]], as reactivated by the [[Empire of the Hand]].<ref name="Fool's Bargain" />

Along with the rest of Aurek Company, Aurek-Seven participated in the [[Capture of the Warlord|liberation of]] [[Kariek]], consisting at this time of the stormtroopers known as [[Jorm Whistler Mackenni|Twister]], [[Shadow (stormtrooper)|Shadow]], [[Cloud (stormtrooper)|Cloud]], and [[Watchman (stormtrooper)|Watchman]].<ref name="Fool's Bargain" />

Twister was subsequently replaced by [[Su-mil|Grappler]], an [[Eickarie]] native of Kariek. In [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], Aurek-Seven accompanied [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Chak Fel]] as a guard detail during the ''[[Outbound Flight]]'' [[Expedition to Outbound Flight|incident]].<ref name="Fool's Bargain" />

Aurek-Seven quietly monitored the [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]] sabotage aboard ''[[Chaf Envoy]]'', saving the lives of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]]. When they reached ''[[Outbound Flight]]'', the stormtroopers, led by Fel and the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Prard'ras'kleoni|Drask]], helped dispatch the Vagaari warriors during the [[Battle of the Redoubt]]. Following the battle, Fel led the Unit to join Drask's Chiss task force to Vagaari space.<ref name="SQ">''[[Survivor's Quest]]''</ref>
